name: Lesser Blight Spawn
description: A writhing mass of shadow corruption given semi-physical form. It looks like living darkness with too many limbs and mouths that open in impossible directions. Manifested by Vexthar from the portal's corruption.

attacks.name: Shadow Claw
attacks.description: A slash with claws made of solidified shadow corruption

attacks.name: Blight Spit
attacks.description: Spits a glob of corrosive shadow essence

special_abilities.name: Blight Being
special_abilities.description: Immune to poison and disease. Takes double damage from radiant sources.

special_abilities.name: Unstable Form
special_abilities.description: When killed, explodes dealing 1d4 necrotic damage to adjacent enemies

behavior.notes: Mindless minion that rushes toward enemies. Prefers melee but will use Blight Spit if can't reach target. Never retreats.
